loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC-1A aggregate readings from 7 live outgoing feeders (UPS/BPDB); 2 UPS feeders and 2 solar incomers are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing real-time snapshot for 6 active feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04); 2 feeders (UPS-05/06) are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power (kW) from outgoing feeders; consumption % and headroom are omitted because the panel's nameplate capacity is unknown.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing consumption trend via panel-aggregate active power; per-member roster data is live for 6 of 8 feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 are dark).
